content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Confirmed that plan_hash auto-population on new row creation is already restored and matches the spec. The effective_plan_hash at fs.rs:3045-3047 uses plan_hash.map(str::to_owned).or_else(|| current_snapshot_hash.clone()), so new TaskRunEntry rows get the snapshot's plan_hash when callers omit it. The comment at fs.rs:3034-3043 documents the known persist_plan() race limitation that the spec explicitly accepted. All 4 test assertions that were updated in the prior conversation correctly expect auto-populated plan_hash from snapshot: plan_hash_auto_populated_from_snapshot, terminal_replay_after_plan_evolution_succeeds, start_replay_after_plan_evolution_does_not_conflict, and safe_backfill_fills_plan_hash_when_snapshot_unchanged. No code changes were needed — the amendment was already addressed in attempt 1 of this completion round.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Verified that effective_plan_hash at fs.rs:3045-3047 already uses plan_hash.map(str::to_owned).or_else(|| current_snapshot_hash.clone()), auto-populating plan_hash from the milestone snapshot on new row creation when the caller omits it. This was restored in attempt 1 of this completion round.
2. [Completed] Verified plan_hash_auto_populated_from_snapshot test asserts Some(expected_plan_hash) after start — confirms new rows auto-populate from snapshot.
3. [Completed] Verified terminal_replay_after_plan_evolution_succeeds test asserts Some(hash_v1) after start — confirms auto-population before plan evolution.
4. [Completed] Verified start_replay_after_plan_evolution_does_not_conflict test extracts hash_v1 via .expect() after start and asserts Some(hash_v1) after replay — confirms original hash retained.
5. [Completed] Verified safe_backfill_fills_plan_hash_when_snapshot_unchanged test asserts Some(expected_hash) after start — confirms new entry auto-populates.
6. [Completed] Ran cargo test --lib (358 passed, 0 failed), cargo clippy -- -D warnings (clean), cargo fmt --check (clean). Full unit test suite shows 682 passed with 1 pre-existing flaky checkpoint failure unrelated to changes.

## Validation Evidence

- cargo test --lib: 358 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored
- cargo test (full): 682 passed, 1 pre-existing failure (checkpoint_test::worktree_adapter — missing directory, unrelated)
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings: no warnings or errors
- cargo fmt --check: all modified files clean
- fs.rs:3045-3047 reads: let effective_plan_hash = plan_hash.map(str::to_owned).or_else(|| current_snapshot_hash.clone()) — auto-population is active
- plan_hash_auto_populated_from_snapshot: persists plan, starts bead with plan_hash=None, verifies Some(expected_plan_hash) appears in lineage entry on creation
- terminal_replay_after_plan_evolution_succeeds: starts bead with plan_hash=None, asserts Some(hash_v1), completes, evolves plan to v2, replays terminal — retains hash_v1
- start_replay_after_plan_evolution_does_not_conflict: starts bead with plan_hash=None, extracts hash_v1 via .expect(), evolves plan to v2, replays start — retains hash_v1
- safe_backfill_fills_plan_hash_when_snapshot_unchanged: starts bead with plan_hash=None, asserts Some(expected_hash) — new entry auto-populates from snapshot
- explicit_plan_hash_takes_precedence_over_snapshot: caller-provided plan_hash wins over snapshot via map().or_else() chain
- All prior round tests continue to pass: named_terminal_replay_succeeds_with_multiple_attempts, terminal_runless_replay_rejected_when_started_at_mismatches, runless_match_rejected_when_started_at_mismatches, runless_start_completed_with_named_run_id, completion_with_conflicting_plan_hash_rejects_runless_match, start_journal_details_round_trips_with_model_render, completion_journal_details_round_trips_with_model_render, journal_merge_fills_all_optional_fields, merge_attempt_entries_fills_all_optional_fields, terminal_replay_legacy_row_without_plan_hash_stays_unset, terminal_replay_with_provenance_does_not_synthesize_plan_hash, running_entry_created_before_plan_is_not_backfilled_on_revisit, safe_backfill_skips_when_snapshot_evolved

## Outstanding Risks

- Pre-existing formatting drift in tests/unit/agent_execution_test.rs is unrelated to these changes but will appear in cargo fmt --check across the full workspace.
- Pre-existing flaky checkpoint_test::worktree_adapter_creates_finds_and_resets_checkpoint_commits failure (missing directory in test environment) is unrelated to these changes.
- The known persist_plan() race documented at fs.rs:3038-3043 means a new entry can get stamped with a newer snapshot hash if persist_plan() runs between bead dispatch and record_task_run_start. The spec accepted this trade-off; the long-term fix is for callers to always supply plan_hash explicitly.
